dry.objective: Govern recursive graph self-evolution with explicit harness responsibilities.

responsibilities.name: task_specification

evidence.objective: Govern recursive graph self-evolution with explicit harness responsibilities.

responsibilities.rationale: The evolution run has an explicit objective.

responsibilities.name: context_selection
responsibilities.rationale: Candidate futures are selected with multi-path context instead of a single deterministic route.

responsibilities.name: memory_observability
responsibilities.rationale: LLM/retrieval/judge/tool events and harness artifacts are observable and redacted.

responsibilities.name: failure_attribution
responsibilities.rationale: Systematic residuals are clustered before new method hypotheses are promoted.

responsibilities.name: verification_protocol
responsibilities.rationale: Promotion decisions have world-model, formal, and falsification evidence.

responsibilities.name: permission_boundary
responsibilities.rationale: Requested operations stay inside declared write/apply/execute permissions.

responsibilities.name: intervention_recording
responsibilities.rationale: Recursive execution has an auditable frontier and daemon intervention records.

responsibilities.name: rollback_contract
responsibilities.rationale: Accepted candidates have parent-return and rollback-sensitive verifier records.

responsibilities.name: evolution_procedure
responsibilities.rationale: The evolution procedure is itself represented as input context, not implicit CLI state only.

procedure_updates.rule: Accepted candidates can be applied only after verifier_stack passes with accepted/rejected protocol checks.
Recursive daemon apply requires recursive_audit closure score >= 0.9 and no critical issues.
LLM/retrieval/judge/tool events and harness artifacts must have redacted manifest coverage.
Accepted candidates exist but require an explicit apply_accepted request.

manifest.assumption: The self-evolution step should be governed by explicit harness responsibilities and permission boundaries.
manifest.why_selected: Evolution procedure/context is itself an assumption that can create regressions if left implicit.
manifest.expected_effect: Return a bounded policy decision and procedure-update plan before graph mutation.
predicted_regressions: accepted candidate applied without rollback contract
manifest.verification_plan: All required harness responsibilities pass and requested mutations stay within permissions.
manifest.rollback_condition: Block apply/write/execute if required responsibilities fail or permissions are exceeded.

LLM/retrieval/judge/tool events and harness artifacts must have redacted manifest coverage.
Accepted candidates exist but require an explicit apply_accepted request.
